ShortDescription.Value: Automatically revives abandoned buildings and rescues condemned ones instead of letting them rot.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Building Reviver
Hate seeing abandoned husks in your city, but don't want to bulldoze them either? This mod brings them back to life.
## Features - Automatically **revives abandoned buildings**: clears the abandoned status, resets the building's condition, and puts the property back on the market so new occupants move in (on by default) - Optionally **rescues condemned buildings** from the wrecking ball - Master on/off switch and per-category toggles in Options → Mods → Building Reviver - **Adjustable sweep frequency** (1–64 scans per in-game day) - Session statistics per category, with a reset button - Lightweight: scans a few times per in-game day, no per-frame cost
## Notes - Revival only removes vanilla status components and resets condition, so it's save-safe - Safe to add or remove from a save at any time - If the underlying problem (land value, services, rent, invalid zoning) persists, a building can relapse — this mod will simply revive it again on a later sweep - Pairs well with Auto Bulldozer if you'd rather demolish some categories and revive others (don't enable both mods for the same category)
